inputs.label: Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the material in kilograms per cubic meter. Common steel density is 7850 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the material in kilograms per cubic meter. Common steel density is 7850 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin metreküp başına kilogram cinsinden yoğunluğu. Yaygın çelik yoğunluğu 7850 kg/m³'tür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte des Materials in Kilogramm pro Kubikmeter. Übliche Stahldichte beträgt 7850 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité du matériau en kilogrammes par mètre cube. La densité de l'acier courant est de 7850 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Initial Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the sheet or bar before cutting in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of the sheet or bar before cutting in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesimden önce levha veya çubuğun metre cinsinden toplam uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtlänge des Blechs oder Stabs vor dem Schneiden in Metern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur totale de la tôle ou de la barre avant coupe en mètres.

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the material in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the material in meters.

inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the material in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the material in meters.

inputs.label: Desired Weight
inputs.businessContext: Target weight after cutting in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target weight after cutting in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesimden sonra kilogram cinsinden hedef ağırlık.
